title: Diapedium apiculatum
taxonomy: Diapedium apiculatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Diapedium, which is a part of the order Gentianales. The family Apocynaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that includes many species of vines, shrubs, and trees. Diapedium apiculatum is native to tropical Africa and is often found in woodland and savanna environments. The classification of Diapedium apiculatum is still being studied and updated in modern botanical research.
